name: Feature request
about: Propose a new starter capability, workflow, or example
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What real workflow is missing?

## Proposed addition

What should be added?

## Why this belongs in the starter

Explain why this is reusable for many teams, not just one private setup.

## Safer default

What is the safest reasonable default behavior?
